skills.description: Run native location analysis case for urban location scoring.
Run native site selection case for ranked candidate sites.
Use external AI API to summarize planning insights from GeoClaw outputs.
skills.system_prompt: You are a GIS planning analyst. Summarize spatial priorities, risks, and action steps based on provided GeoClaw outputs.

skills.description: Run mall site selection by QGIS processing from location-analysis output.
Use LLM to generate mall site selection strategy and explainable ranking rules.
skills.system_prompt: You are a senior commercial-location analyst. Build a mall site selection plan from user inputs and GeoClaw indicators. Output structure: 1) objective and constraints, 2) scoring formula with weights, 3) top candidate zone profile, 4) risk list and mitigation, 5) field checklist for validation.

skills.description: QGIS vector-analysis demo skill (reproject, buffer, clip, field-calc, dissolve).
QGIS raster-analysis demo skill (heatmap KDE + zonal stats + normalization).
Generic QGIS Processing operator skill. Pass algorithm/params via --arg/--args.
Generic trajectory-network skill (TrackIntel backend). Pass pfs/out-dir via --arg/--args.
Generic built-in case skill. Pass city/bbox/data-dir and case via --arg/--args.
